chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Ruling Regarding a Man Who Kills Two or More Men, and a Group That Gathers to Kill a Man

text: 5231 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "قَضَى عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي رَجُلَيْنِ أَمْسَكَ أَحَدُهُمَا وَ قَتَلَ اَلْآخَرُ فَقَالَ "يُقْتَلُ اَلْقَاتِلُ وَ يُحْبَسُ اَلْآخَرُ حَتَّى يَمُوتَ غَمّاً كَمَا حَبَسَهُ عَلَيْهِ حَتَّى مَاتَ غَمّاً" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5231 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled in the case of two men where one of them restrained the victim while the other killed him.
Imam (as) said: 'The killer shall be executed, and the one who restrained the victim shall be imprisoned until he dies in grief, just as he caused the victim to be held until he died in grief.'"
